allow_auto_provision.name: LDAP Login - Allow Auto Provision
allow_auto_provision.remark: Whether unknown directory users may be auto-provisioned. Allowed values: true, false.

base_dn.name: LDAP Login - Base DN
base_dn.remark: Base distinguished name used when searching for users.

bind_dn.name: LDAP Login - Bind DN
bind_dn.remark: Service account distinguished name used to bind to the directory.

bind_password.name: LDAP Login - Bind Password
bind_password.remark: Service account password. Leave blank or masked to keep the existing value.

connection_key.name: LDAP Login - Connection Key
connection_key.remark: Stable connection identifier used by the host external-login seam.

display_name.name: LDAP Login - Display Name
display_name.remark: Login entry label shown to end users.

display_name_attr.name: LDAP Login - Display Name Attribute
display_name_attr.remark: Directory attribute used for the user display name.

email_attr.name: LDAP Login - Email Attribute
email_attr.remark: Directory attribute used for the user email address.

host.name: LDAP Login - Host
host.remark: Directory server hostname or IP address.

subject_attr.name: LDAP Login - Subject Attribute
subject_attr.remark: Directory attribute used as the external subject identifier.

tls_mode.name: LDAP Login - TLS Mode
tls_mode.remark: LDAP TLS mode for directory connections.

user_dn_template.name: LDAP Login - User DN Template
user_dn_template.remark: Optional DN template used to construct the user DN directly.

user_filter.name: LDAP Login - User Filter
user_filter.remark: LDAP filter template used to locate a user entry.
